mapper.select: SELECT * FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY read_flag ASC, created_at DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND read_flag = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification ( user_id, type, title, content, related_type, related_id, remind_at, read_flag ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{relatedType}, #{relatedId}, #{remindAt}, #{readFlag} )
